name: AzureFederatedAuth
description: Gets OIDC token and sets ARM vars (optionally GIT_ACCESS_TOKEN).
author: Slawomir Koszewski

inputs.name: serviceConnectionARM
inputs.label: Azure Resource Manager service connection
inputs.helpMarkDown: AzureRM service connection used to request the OIDC token. Requires System.AccessToken to be available to the job.

inputs.name: setGitAccessToken
inputs.label: Set GIT_ACCESS_TOKEN for Azure DevOps Git
inputs.helpMarkDown: Exchange OIDC for Azure DevOps scope and set secret GIT_ACCESS_TOKEN.

inputs.name: serviceConnectionGit
inputs.label: Azure Resource Manager service connection (Git)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional AzureRM service connection used to acquire GIT_ACCESS_TOKEN. If not specified, the ARM service connection is reused.

inputs.name: printTokenHashes
inputs.label: Print SHA256 token hashes to logs
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, prints SHA256 hashes of ARM_OIDC_TOKEN and GIT_ACCESS_TOKEN (if requested).
